markdown_full:
# PARTHA SARATHI MOHANTY

📞 +91-8984899989 | ✉️ parthasarathi.prf@gmail.com
📍 Hyderabad, India | Passport: Z7018683 | Driving License: 2W & 4W
**Willing to Relocate:** Yes (Anywhere in the World)

----

# PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY:

Experienced **ICT & ELV Project Manager** with **11 years** of expertise in **ICT Infrastructure, Data Centres, Airports, Oil & Gas, and Commercial Projects**. Strong background in **project execution, design review, vendor management, project execution, ITC & quality control**. Skilled in managing multi-disciplinary teams, coordinating with clients, and delivering projects to international standards for organisations such as (Tata Projects, GMR, L&T, Yokogawa, Microsoft India, Saudi Aramco & many more).

----

**Qualification: B. Tech in electronics & telecommunication engineering from Biju Patnaik university of technology, Odisha in 2010.**

----

# ORGANISATION SERVED / PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE (11 years overall):

**Senior Manager – MEP (ELV & ICT) @Tata Projects Ltd, Hyderabad, India**
🗓️ Nov 2024 – Oct 2025

**IT Project Manager – ELV & ICT@GMR Group – Hyderabad, India**
🗓️ Dec 2023 – Oct 2024

**Senior Telecom Engineer – Projects (ELV & ICT) @Web synergies / Yokogawa Ltd for Saudi Aramco (Jafurah Project, Saudi Arabia)**
🗓️ Jun 2023 – Oct 2023

**Senior Engineer – Projects (ELV & ICT) @L&T Technology Services Ltd, Bengaluru, India**
🗓️ Dec 2016 – Dec 2019

**Project Engineer – ELV & ICT@ L&T Infotech (on AATS Services payroll), Odisha, India**
🗓️ Jan 2016 – Dec 2016

**Technical Engineer – ELV & ICT @Firelink Co. W.L.L, Bahrain, Middle East**
🗓️ Jul 2014 – Aug 2015

**Project Engineer – ELV & ICT@ Orcel Wireless Engineering Pvt. Ltd, Odisha, India**
🗓️ Oct 2010 – Jun 2014

# <u>Roles & Responsibilities:</u>

## <u>Project Execution & design co-ordination:</u>

* Led end-to-end execution of ICT and ELV systems including CCTV, ACS, FAS, PA, Wi-Fi, IP Telephony, CUPPS, CUSS, E-Gates, FIDS, IBS, TETRA, and more.

---

* Collate drawings and documents from Design team required for submission to statutory authorities,
* Collaborate with cross-functional teams including engineers, designers, contractors, and clients to define project requirements, objectives, and deliverables.
* Provide technical expertise and guidance to project teams on the design, installation, testing, and commissioning of fire protection, security, safety, and ELV & ICT systems
* Foster a culture of safety, quality, and continuous improvement within the project team, ensuring compliance with relevant regulations, codes, and standards.
* Act as the primary point of contact for clients, consultants, and regulatory authorities, addressing inquiries, resolving issues, and maintaining positive relationships throughout the project lifecycle.

<u>**Project Billing:**</u>

* Verify contractor bills and submit them to the Project Head for approval.
* Check and process daily NMR / DLR (Daily Labour Report) bills and Joint Measurement Sheets (JMS) to ensure accuracy and timely submission.

<u>**Customer Relationship Management:**</u>

* Take overall responsibility for identifying, tracking, and ensuring timely rectification of snags during the project closure phase.
* Oversee and monitor the flat handover process in coordination with team members, ensuring quality standards and customer readiness are met.

<u>**People Management:**</u>

* Foster team building and promote a collaborative work environment.
* Build and maintain strong, professional relationships with contractors and vendors to ensure smooth coordination and execution.

<u>**PROJECTS executed till date:**</u>

* **Microsoft Data Centre, Hyderabad** – ELV & ICT Systems design co-ordination & execution
* **Hyderabad International Airport Expansion** – Full ICT & ELV Infrastructure execution
* **Saudi Aramco Jafurah Oil & Gas Project** – Designing of Access Control System
* **Al-Bayt Football Stadium, Qatar** – Design & Execution of FAS Systems
* **UP Police Bhawan, Lucknow** – Design & Execution of CCTV, FAS, PA & ACS
* **NTPC Thermal Plant, Khargone** – Project execution of FAS, PA, CCTV
* **SCB Medical College, Cuttack** – Project Execution of FAS
* **Orange Tower, Bahrain** – Project Design & Execution of FAS, CCTV, PA

**DECLARATION**

I hereby declare that the information furnished above is true to the best of my knowledge and belief.
**Signature:** Partha Sarathi Mohanty
